files.label: Multi-Domain Use Cases & Scenarios
files.description: Ready-to-explore set of use cases, scenarios, requirements, functions, and components across four domains: EV Battery Management, UAV Search & Rescue, Medical Infusion Pump, and Smart Factory AMR. Full traceability chains included.

files.label: Healthcare Device Signals (JSON)
files.description: IEC 60601 compliant patient monitoring, infusion pump, and ventilator signal architecture with clinical alarm thresholds and safety classifications.

files.label: Healthcare Ecosystem (JSON)
files.description: Macro system-of-systems: care delivery, financing, pharma, public health, regulation, IT. With functions, signals, tiered decomposition, requirements, and ports.

files.label: Healthcare System (SysML v2)
files.description: Hospital patient monitoring system in SysML v2: vital signs monitoring, clinical alarm management, medication delivery, and integrated EMR interface with safety requirements.

files.label: Aircraft Propulsion (EMOF)
files.description: EMOF/Ecore model representation.

files.label: Aircraft Propulsion (JSON)
files.description: 81-node propulsion system graph — functions, components, signals, requirements, states, and interfaces with full relation graph.

files.label: Aircraft Propulsion (RDF/TTL)
files.description: Aircraft propulsion model as RDF Turtle triples.

files.label: Aircraft Propulsion (XMI)
files.description: UML/SysML XMI export from Cameo.

files.label: Avionics ICD (JSON)
files.description: Avionics Interface Control Document: subsystems, data buses, signals, and protocol interfaces.

files.label: Bracket / Pipeline Ontology (Turtle)
files.description: RDF Turtle ontology describing aerospace structural bracket and pipeline entities with material and manufacturing relationships.

files.label: Flight Telemetry (CSV)
files.description: Flight test telemetry data in CSV format — time-stamped sensor readings including altitude, airspeed, engine parameters, and control surface positions.

files.label: Spacecraft MBSE Ontology (Turtle)
files.description: MBSE ontology for spacecraft systems in RDF Turtle: subsystems, functions, interfaces, and mission requirements as linked data.

files.label: Spacecraft System (SysML v2)
files.description: Generic spacecraft system in SysML v2: attitude control, power subsystem, communications, propulsion, thermal control, and payload interface with decomposed requirements.

files.label: UAV Flight Modes (CSV)
files.description: UAV flight mode state machine in CSV: mode transitions, guard conditions, and trigger events for autonomous flight management.

files.label: Aircraft Requirements (ReqIF)
files.description: Aircraft system requirements in Requirements Interchange Format (ReqIF) — importable directly into DOORS, Polarion, or Codebeamer.

files.label: Engineering Ontology (Turtle)
files.description: General systems engineering ontology in RDF Turtle: components, functions, requirements, and relationships with formal axioms.

files.label: Functional Decomposition (JSON)
files.description: Hierarchical function decomposition model with allocations, interfaces, and requirements linkages.

files.label: Smart Factory / AMR (JSON)
files.description: Autonomous Mobile Robot fleet in a smart manufacturing environment: navigation, safety, fleet management, and digital twin signals.

files.label: SOSA Sensor Ontology (Turtle)
files.description: W3C SOSA (Sensor, Observation, Sample, Actuator) ontology instantiation for IoT and cyber-physical systems sensor description.

files.label: Automotive CAN Signals (DBC)
files.description: Vector DBC CAN database: EV powertrain CAN messages for BMS, MCU, VCU, and OBC with signal scaling, offsets, and value descriptions.

files.label: Automotive Signals (JSON)
files.description: Automotive signal architecture with ECU interfaces, CAN/LIN bus signals, and sensor/actuator assignments.

files.label: EV Powertrain ECU — AUTOSAR CP (ARXML)
files.description: AUTOSAR Classic Platform R22-11 software architecture for an EV powertrain ECU. Covers BMS (ASIL-D), VCU (ASIL-D), MCU (ASIL-C), TMS (ASIL-B), and OBC SWCs with full port interface definitions, sender-receiver and client-server interfaces, runnable entities, and assembly connectors. Demonstrates SOC/torque/temperature/fault signal flows.

files.label: EV Powertrain System (JSON)
files.description: Complete EV powertrain MBSE model: Battery, BMS, Motor, Inverter, VCU, OBC, TMS — 165 entities with 8 stakeholders, 5 actors, 26 CAN bus signals, 20 requirements, 8 use cases, 13 states, 11 guards, and full signal-wired I/O for all 12 functions.

files.label: Autonomous Vehicle (JSON)
files.description: Autonomous vehicle JSON snapshot with sensors, perception, planning, and actuation nodes.

files.label: Autonomous Vehicle System (SysML v2)
files.description: SAE L4 autonomous vehicle: LiDAR (128-ch Luminar Hydra), 4D radar (Continental ARS540), camera arrays (8), HD map localization, behavior planning (POMDP), motion planning (MPC), drive-by-wire, cybersecurity gateway (ISO 21434), and ISO 26262 ASIL-D safety architecture.

files.label: AV Compute Platform (AADL)
files.description: ISO 26262 ASIL-D AV compute architecture: NVIDIA Orin SoC, perception pipeline threads, Kalman filter fusion, trajectory planning, drive-by-wire CAN interface, AUTOSAR Adaptive partitioning, hardware watchdog, SOTIF power-on self-test.

files.label: Commercial Aircraft Avionics Platform (AADL)
files.description: DO-178C / DO-254 / DO-160G integrated avionics architecture: triple-redundant IRS, dual ADIRU, dual GPS, FMS with LNAV/VNAV threads, AFCS pitch/roll/throttle/safety-monitor threads, captain and F/O PFD and ND, dual FADEC, ACMS/QAR prognostics, dual IMA cores, AFDX network, and ARINC 429 sensor buses.

files.label: Commercial Aircraft Flight Control System (MATLAB .m)
files.description: Narrow-body FBW flight control system in MATLAB: aerodynamic model (m=79000 kg, S=122.6 m², cruise M=0.78/FL370), longitudinal/lateral stability derivatives, short-period and lateral-directional state-space models, C* FBW control law, PID pitch/roll rate controllers, yaw damper, altitude hold, VS hold, IAS autothrottle, heading select, ILS CAT III autoland, actuator TF models (elevator/aileron/rudder), triplex FDI voter, and Breguet range analysis. Requirements REQ-FCS-001–008.

files.label: MathWorks Electric Throttle Control (XMI)
files.description: Automotive electric throttle control SysML model exported from Cameo by MathWorks. Internal block diagrams, requirements, and signal flow.

files.label: NIST Central Fill Pharmacy (MDZIP)
files.description: NIST discrete-event SysML model of an automated pharmacy fulfillment system. Blocks, activities, and constraints.

files.label: NIST Electronics Assembly (MDZIP)
files.description: NIST SysML case study for electronics manufacturing assembly — resource allocation, process flow, and production logistics.

files.label: Boeing 777X — Full System Architecture (SysML v2)
files.description: Top-down full functional decomposition of the Boeing 777-9X wide-body twin-engine transport: 9 Level-1 functions (including FoldingWingTip), 31 Level-2 functions, 12 physical subsystems (GE9X engines with CMC hot section, CFRP composite wing, FBW 777X FCS, avionics, 6-wheel bogie landing gear, ECS, hydraulics, VFG electrical, fuel, comms, cabin, AHM), 35 system requirements, and full allocation and verification constraints. CS-25/FAR-25, ARP 4754A, DO-178C, ETOPS 330, SAF-capable basis.

files.label: Aircraft Turbofan Propulsion — LEAP-1B Class (SysML v2)
files.description: 2-spool high-bypass turbofan (CFM LEAP-1B class, Boeing 737 MAX). Fan module, LPC, HPC (9-stage, OPR 40:1), TAPS combustor, cooled HPT, FADEC (DO-178C Level A).

files.label: Apollo 11 Spacecraft Propulsion (Airbus SysML v2)
files.description: Real Airbus open-source SysML v2 model (MPL-2.0). Saturn V rocket with F-1 engines, J-2 upper-stage engines, Apollo CSM service propulsion, Lunar Module descent/ascent stages.

files.label: EV Powertrain — Battery Electric Vehicle (SysML v2)
files.description: 100 kWh BEV powertrain in native SysML v2: BatteryPack (8 modules, 7104 NMC-811 cells), PMSM traction motor (350 kW peak), SiC inverter (FOC), onboard charger (11.5 kW V2G), CCS Combo2 DCFC (250 kW), thermal management, and full vehicle integration.

files.label: OMG Vehicle Definitions (Official SysML v2 Spec)
files.description: Official OMG SysML v2 specification example — Vehicle, Transmission, AxleAssembly, Axle, Wheel, Lugbolt with port definitions and Mounting interface.

files.label: OMG Vehicle Usages (Official SysML v2 Spec)
files.description: Official OMG SysML v2 spec example — vehicle configurations C1/C2/C3 with axle assemblies, wheel redefinitions, interface connections, and drive shaft flow.

files.label: Nuclear Plant I&C System (AADL)
files.description: IEC 61513 nuclear instrumentation & control: Category A safety-critical process, thread, and device components. Core temperature monitoring, emergency shutdown, ECCS actuation, safety bus with explicit scheduling and AADL annex properties.

files.label: Nuclear Power Plant (JSON)
files.description: PWR nuclear plant JSON model: reactor, cooling, steam, turbine, and safety system nodes.

files.label: Nuclear Power Plant (SysML v2)
files.description: PWR nuclear power plant MBSE model: reactor pressure vessel, primary/secondary cooling loops, steam generators, turbine-generator, safety systems (ECCS, containment, SCRAM), radiation monitoring, and multi-layered defense-in-depth per NUREG-0800. IEC 61508 safety functions.

files.label: Submarine Combat System (AADL)
files.description: DO-178C / MIL-STD-882 safety-critical AADL model of sonar signal processing, fire control, and weapons management. Real-time threads with rate monotonic scheduling, redundant safety buses, ARINC 653 partitioning.

files.label: Submarine Combat System (JSON)
files.description: Submarine combat management system JSON model: sonar, fire control, weapons, and navigation nodes.

files.label: Submarine Combat System (SysML v2)
files.description: Virginia-class SSN combat management system: sonar suite (bow sphere, TB-16/29 arrays, MFTA), torpedo tubes (Mk 48 ADCAP/HAAS), VLS (Tomahawk, Harpoon), fire control (AN/BYG-1), electronic warfare, photonics masts. MIL-STD-882 safety architecture.

files.label: Submarine Sonar Processing (MATLAB .m)
files.description: Passive sonar signal processing in MATLAB: beamforming, matched filter detection, track-while-scan, and target motion analysis (TMA).

files.label: High-Speed Rail (JSON)
files.description: High-speed rail system JSON model: traction, TCMS, signalling, and braking subsystem nodes.

files.label: High-Speed Rail System (SysML v2)
files.description: 350 km/h high-speed EMU: traction system (IGBT inverter, permanent magnet motors, 25 kV pantograph), TCMS, ETCS Level 2 (FS/SH/SR/SB modes), braking (rheostatic + disc + EDB + magnetic rail), and SIL4 safety architecture per EN 50129.

files.label: Train Control Network (AADL)
files.description: MVB/Ethernet-based TCMS AADL model: IEC 61375 train bus, SIL4 ATP/ATO safety partition, propulsion control ECU, brake management, door control, and diagnostic gateway.

files.label: Offshore Wind Turbine (JSON)
files.description: Offshore wind turbine JSON model: rotor, nacelle, tower, SCADA, and grid interface nodes.

files.label: Offshore Wind Turbine (SysML v2)
files.description: 15 MW direct-drive NREL offshore turbine: rotor-nacelle assembly, permanent magnet generator, hydraulic pitch & yaw, subsea export cable (66 kV, 20 km), SCADA, grid code compliance (FRT, reactive power), and IEC 61400-1 / 61400-3 safety architecture.

files.label: Wind Turbine Hub (STEP)
files.description: Offshore wind turbine hub assembly in STEP format: pitch bearing interfaces, blade root flanges, spinner, and pitch drive mounting provisions.

files.label: Wind Turbine SCADA (AADL)
files.description: IEC 62443 OT security + IEC 61400-25 SCADA AADL model: turbine controller (pitch, yaw, converter), condition monitoring (CMS), grid interface, remote DMZ gateway, safety PLC, and cybersecurity monitor.

files.label: AV Sensor Fusion (MATLAB .m)
files.description: Autonomous vehicle sensor fusion algorithm in MATLAB: LiDAR-camera-radar fusion using Kalman filter, object tracking, and occupancy grid updates.

files.label: EV Battery Management System (MATLAB .m)
files.description: BMS controller, cell estimator, thermal model, and contactor controller classes with full function decomposition and signal flows. Parses to Blocks, Functions, and Signals.

files.label: EV Powertrain Control (Simulink MDL)
files.description: EV powertrain Simulink model in MDL format: driver demand processing, torque arbitration with derating, field-oriented motor control (FOC), and vehicle dynamics.

files.label: Nuclear Reactor Control (MATLAB .m)
files.description: PWR reactor control system in MATLAB: rod control algorithm, coolant flow regulation, SCRAM logic, and thermal-hydraulic state estimation.

files.label: Rail Traction Control (MATLAB .m)
files.description: High-speed rail traction control in MATLAB: torque demand processing, slip detection, anti-skid, and adhesion optimization for variable rail conditions.

files.label: Wind Turbine Control (MATLAB .m)
files.description: Wind turbine control system in MATLAB: pitch control, variable-speed MPPT, tower damping, and fault detection for above-rated wind conditions.

files.label: LiDAR Sensor Housing (STEP)
files.description: Automotive-grade LiDAR sensor housing assembly in STEP AP214 format: protective dome, mounting bracket, thermal management interface, and electrical connector housing.

files.label: Rail Bogie Assembly (STEP)
files.description: High-speed rail bogie assembly in STEP AP242 format: wheelsets, primary/secondary suspension, traction motor mounting, and braking equipment structure.

files.label: Reactor Pressure Vessel (STEP)
files.description: Nuclear PWR pressure vessel geometry in STEP AP242 format: vessel shell, nozzles, flange, and internals support structure.

files.label: Torpedo Tube Assembly (STEP)
files.description: Submarine torpedo tube assembly in STEP format: tube structure, breech/muzzle doors, water flood valve, and handling equipment.
